title: leonohebe subulata
intro: Leonohebe subulata, a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand, is a species of shrub that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is also known as the 'subulate leonohebe' or 'New Zealand leonohebe'. The medicinal properties of Leonohebe subulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
